items.caption: A vector illustration of a camera drone, depicted in a hand-drawn style. the drone is shown from a top-down perspective, showcasing its four propellers, each with a red and white color scheme. the body of the drone is white, with a yellow panel on the underside, possibly indicating a camera or sensor area. the drone's legs are black, and it has a round, black nose, which is likely the camera or sensor housing. the background is plain white, emphasizing the drone as the sole subject of the illustration.
